info.title: Omise API
info.description: Omise payment gateway API for managing charges, customers, cards, tokens, refunds, transfers, recipients, sources, payment links, and account balance.

post.description: Create a new charge to process a payment.

get.description: List all charges with optional filtering.

amount.description: Refund amount in smallest currency unit

post.description: Create a card token using the Vault server. Uses public key authentication only.

type.description: Payment source type (alipay, fpx, econtext, etc.)

get.summary: List charges for a payment link

200.description: List of charges for the link

get.summary: List payment links for a team

SecretKeyAuth.description: HTTP Basic Auth using secret API key as username (password left blank)

PublicKeyAuth.description: HTTP Basic Auth using public API key as username (for token/vault operations)
